create_time.description: Timestamp when the Firestore database was created, useful for auditing and tracking.

earliest_version_time.description: Earliest time for which database versions are retained, helpful for recovery purposes.

etag.description: Entity tag used for concurrency control and detecting resource changes.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Firestore database, used to reference the resource.

key_prefix.description: Prefix for database keys, useful for organizing and accessing stored data.

uid.description: Globally unique identifier for the Firestore database, essential for API operations.

update_time.description: Timestamp of the last database update, useful for tracking changes.

version_retention_period.description: Duration for retaining database versions, critical for compliance and recovery.
